name: Source C_version C201 Matrix

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - "Source_revised2/**"
      - "run_source_revised2_single.py"
      - "gha_source_revised2_build_matrix.py"
      - "gha_source_revised2_run_one.py"
      - "gha_source_revised2_summarize.py"
      - "source_revised2_c201_batch.yml"
      - "test_data/data_demand_random_50_batch_all1_equal_cluster/**"
      - "test_data/data_demand_random_50_batch_all1_equal_random/**"
      - ".github/workflows/source-revised2-c201.yml"

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build-matrix:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      matrix: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.matrix }}
      total_jobs: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.total_jobs }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"

      - name: Build Matrix
        id: make-matrix
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python gha_source_revised2_build_matrix.py --config source_revised2_c201_batch.yml > matrix.json
          MATRIX_JSON=$(cat matrix.json)
          TOTAL_JOBS=$(python - <<'PY'
          import json
          with open("matrix.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
              print(len(json.load(f)))
          PY
          )
          echo "matrix=$MATRIX_JSON" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "total_jobs=$TOTAL_JOBS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Total jobs: $TOTAL_JOBS"

  run-one-job:
    needs: build-matrix
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 130
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        task: ${{ fromJson(needs.build-matrix.outputs.matrix) }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"

      - name: Install Dependencies
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install numpy openpyxl
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then python -m pip install -r requirements.txt; fi

      - name: Run Matrix Task
        shell: bash
        run: |
          mkdir -p Result/gha_source_revised2
          python gha_source_revised2_run_one.py \
            --instance "${{ matrix.task.instance_path }}" \
            --instance-group "${{ matrix.task.instance_group }}" \
            --job-id "${{ matrix.task.job_id }}" \
            --run-index "${{ matrix.task.run_index }}" \
            --A "${{ matrix.task.A }}" \
            --L "${{ matrix.task.L }}" \
            --config source_revised2_c201_batch.yml \
            --output "Result/gha_source_revised2/job_${{ matrix.task.job_id }}.json"

      - name: Upload Task Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: source-revised2-job-${{ matrix.task.job_id }}
          path: Result/gha_source_revised2/job_${{ matrix.task.job_id }}.json

  summarize:
    needs:
      - build-matrix
      - run-one-job
    if: always()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"

      - name: Install Dependencies
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install openpyxl

      - name: Download Artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: downloaded_source_revised2

      - name: Build Excel Summary
        shell: bash
        run: |
          mkdir -p Result
          python gha_source_revised2_summarize.py \
            --input-dir downloaded_source_revised2 \
            --output-xlsx Result/source_revised2_c201_summary.xlsx \
            --output-json Result/source_revised2_c201_summary.json

      - name: Upload Summary Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: source-revised2-c201-summary
          path: |
            Result/source_revised2_c201_summary.xlsx
            Result/source_revised2_c201_summary.json
